# PrayCalc

GPS-accurate Islamic prayer time calculator. Web + iOS + Android.

**Live:** [praycalc.com](https://praycalc.com) | **Docs:** [praycalc.org](https://praycalc.org)

## Quick Links

- [[Getting Started]] -- set up local development
- [[Architecture]] -- how the app is built
- [[Features]] -- full feature list with status
- [[Contributing]] -- how to contribute

## About

PrayCalc provides accurate Islamic prayer times for any location worldwide. It supports all major calculation methods (ISNA, MWL, Egypt, Umm al-Qura, Tehran, Karachi), includes Qibla direction, adhan notifications, prayer calendars, and works offline as a PWA.

The project includes three surfaces:
- **Web app** at `web/` -- Next.js, deployed to [praycalc.com](https://praycalc.com)
- **Documentation site** at `org/` -- Next.js + MDX, deployed to [praycalc.org](https://praycalc.org)
- **Mobile app** at `flutter/` -- Flutter for iOS and Android
